metaDescription: Learn what's involved in earning an official Jira or Atlassian certification, from choosing the right one to preparing for the exam.
intro: A Jira or Atlassian certification can help validate your skills for administering or working within the platform. This guide covers the general path to earning one, from picking the right certification to preparing for the exam.

steps.heading: Choose the right certification track
steps.body: Atlassian offers different certifications depending on your role, such as administrator-focused or agile-focused paths, so pick the one that matches your actual work.

steps.heading: Review the exam requirements
steps.body: Check the official Atlassian certification page for prerequisites, exam format, and topics covered before committing to a study plan.

steps.heading: Study using official resources
steps.body: Use Atlassian's documentation, training materials, and practice questions to prepare, since the exam is based on real platform functionality.

steps.heading: Get hands-on practice
steps.body: Spend time actually working inside Jira, since practical familiarity with features like workflows, permissions, and administration tends to matter as much as memorized facts.

steps.heading: Schedule and take the exam
steps.body: Once you feel prepared, register for the exam through the official certification provider and complete it under the required conditions.

faq.question: Is Jira certification the same as Atlassian certification?
faq.answer: Jira certifications are offered under the broader Atlassian certification program, which also covers other Atlassian products.

faq.question: Do I need work experience before getting certified?
faq.answer: It's not always strictly required, but hands-on experience with Jira significantly helps with both passing the exam and applying the certification in practice.

faq.question: How long is a Jira certification valid?
faq.answer: Certifications from Atlassian typically have an expiration period, after which you may need to recertify, so check the current terms when you enroll.

faq.question: Does certification guarantee a job in Jira administration?
faq.answer: No, certification demonstrates knowledge of the platform, but it's usually combined with real experience and other skills when it comes to landing a role.
